source_meta.source_document: LCP Distal Femur Plate Surgical Technique

systems.system_notes: Laterally placed distal femur locking plate system within the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes technique and catalog materials describe dedicated distal femur plating instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe the distal femur plate family.
Official inventory materials describe compatible screw fixation for the distal femur plate system.
Official technique resources describe guide and instrumentation workflow for distal femur plate application.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the distal femur plate family and inventory references, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper sterile implant listing or broader parts-matrix pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
